description: This Tefal Unlimited On 28cm frying pan is engineered for professional-grade durability in a busy UK kitchen. It features the Titanium Anti-Scratch non-stick coating, which is six times stronger than standard Tefal coatings, allowing for the use of metal utensils without damage. This specific variant includes the Thermo-Signal heat indicator, which turns solid red when the pan reaches the ideal starting temperature. The Thermo-Fusion+ induction base ensures fast and even heat distribution across the entire surface for consistent searing and professional frying results.
features: Diameter: 28cm. Coating: Titanium Anti-Scratch non-stick reinforcement. Base Construction: Thermo-Fusion+ extra-large grid induction base for even thermal distribution. Thermal Indicator: Thermo-Signal turns solid red at optimal cooking temperature. Thermal Tolerance: Oven safe up to 175°C. Compatibility: Induction, Gas, Electric, Ceramic, Halogen.
uses: Searing meat, frying eggs, sautéing vegetables, pancakes, omelettes, finishing dishes in the oven.
name: Tefal Unlimited On Frying Pan 28cm
